title: Sony and Bungie carry out massive layoffs, leaving most of the Destiny 2 and Marathon team jobless
summary: The restructuring announces the layoff of 292 employees and practically dissolves the Destiny 2 development team, sparking a wave of reactions in the industry.

title: GTA 6 opens pre-orders at a price of $80 and announces it will not have a physical version at launch
summary: Rockstar puts the pre-orders of its highly anticipated title on sale while fans and analysts debate its price and the lack of a disc.

title: Microsoft will raise the price of Xbox Series worldwide in August due to the component crisis
summary: The company confirms a new increase in the price of its consoles, citing the high cost of RAM memory and storage as justification.

title: Valve launches its new Steam Machine amid criticism over its performance and imitation of its design by a French copy
summary: Valve's PC console faces criticism over its promised 4K performance, while the clone 'Stim Machine' copies its design at the same price.

title: New GTA 6 details reveal weapons, missions with influencers, and a social world inspired by TikTok
summary: The new leaks and interviews reveal the game's ambitious social media system and the confirmed arsenal to date.

title: Deltarune Chapter 5 sweeps Steam with 300,000 concurrent players and its creator confirms Chapter 6 for 2027
summary: The long-awaited chapter of Toby Fox's indie RPG breaks audience records and brings new content, puzzles, and game modes.

title: The Steam Summer Sale 2026 is available with big discounts on games for all tastes
summary: Thousands of games, from blockbusters to indie titles, can be purchased at reduced prices during the platform's annual sale.

title: Epic Games harshly criticizes Valve for its new policy on labeling games with artificial intelligence
summary: Tim Sweeney calls Valve's decision to require developers to disclose the use of generative AI in their games 'irresponsible'.

title: Mystery of Jill Valentine's photo in Resident Evil 2 solved after 28 years of fan search
summary: The identity of the man in the photograph that has been an enigma for decades has finally been officially revealed.

title: Hasbro seeks for Peppa Pig child actors to sign contracts allowing their voices to be used with artificial intelligence
summary: The company that owns Dungeons & Dragons has been criticized for attempting to exploit the voices of child actors through an ambiguous contract clause.

title: The White House publishes a controversial Destiny 2 meme in the midst of massive layoff crisis at Bungie
summary: The official account of the US administration uses a meme from the game while the studio goes through its worst labor situation.

title: South of Midnight studio Compulsion Games openly seeks work for fear of new layoffs at Xbox
summary: Studio employees are actively looking in the job market ahead of a possible new staff cut by Microsoft Gaming.

title: Enshrouded announces its exit from early access version for next October 15
summary: The popular survival game from Keen Games will have its full launch this fall with new features and content.

title: Insomniac Games' Marvel's Wolverine confirms it will arrive with a physical disc at launch
summary: The superhero game bets on the traditional physical format, in clear contrast to the distribution strategy chosen by Rockstar for GTA 6.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen shows its first gameplay trailer and all new features
summary: Capcom reveals the long-awaited content of the expansion for its acclaimed action-adventure RPG.

title: Monster Hunter Stories 3 receives a new story DLC 'Rudy' along with a free update
summary: Players can enjoy a new side story and real monsters thanks to the patch and additional content.

title: Capcom shares the first look at gameplay and a new trailer for Onimusha: Way of the Sword
summary: The Japanese company shows the long-awaited return of the action samurai saga with new images and details.

title: Takashi Tezuka leaves his executive position at Nintendo, but the legendary designer does not fully retire
summary: The veteran creator of Super Mario and The Legend of Zelda steps down from his position in June, but will remain with the company as a developer.

title: Amazon Prime Day gaming deals include discounts on video games, laptops, and components
summary: Amazon's annual discount event offers great opportunities for gamers, with hundreds of products on sale.

title: PlayStation sells the PS5 at a loss in Japan and tightens store rules against junk games
summary: Sony faces a complex financial scenario in the Japanese market and applies new stricter guidelines for developers on PlayStation Store.
